Alex Freeman.note: United States' young right-side runner, useful for pushing the line higher and recovering wide space.
Alex Freeman.noteZh: 亚历克斯·弗里曼是美国年轻的右路跑动点，适合把边路位置推高并回追边路空间。

Alex Zendejas.summary: Álex Zendejas is a United States right winger from América who gives the national team left-footed service, box arrivals, and Liga MX sharpness.
Alex Zendejas.note: United States' left-footed right winger, dangerous when he slips inside and serves early balls into the box.
Alex Zendejas.noteZh: 阿莱克斯·森德哈斯是美国左脚右边锋，内收到中路并提前把球送入禁区时很危险。

Antonee Robinson.note: United States' left-flank engine, able to create width repeatedly and still recover behind the ball.
Antonee Robinson.noteZh: 安东尼·罗宾逊是美国左路发动机，能反复制造宽度，并仍然回收到球后防守。

Auston Trusty.note: United States' left-sided centre-back option, useful for aerial defending and covering space beside Robinson.
Auston Trusty.noteZh: 奥斯顿·特拉斯蒂是美国左侧中卫选择，适合空中防守并覆盖罗宾逊身旁的空间。

Brenden Aaronson.note: United States' pressing connector, valuable for turning loose touches into attacks before defenses reset.
Brenden Aaronson.noteZh: 布伦登·阿伦森是美国压迫连接点，能在防守重整前把松散触球变成进攻。

Chris Brady.note: United States' young goalkeeper depth, bringing reflexes and upside if the match gets stretched.
Chris Brady.noteZh: 克里斯·布雷迪是美国年轻门将深度，比赛被拉开时能带来反应和上升空间。

Chris Richards.note: United States' athletic defensive anchor, trusted to defend space and attack first contacts on set pieces.
Chris Richards.noteZh: 克里斯·理查兹是美国运动能力强的防守支柱，能防守空间并在定位球中争抢第一点。

Christian Pulisic.note: United States' headline attacker, most dangerous when he isolates a defender and drives into shooting zones.
Christian Pulisic.noteZh: 克里斯蒂安·普利西奇是美国头号攻击手，一对一面对防守者并推进到射门区域时最危险。

Cristian Roldan.note: United States' steady midfield glue, useful for keeping attacks connected and closing transition leaks.
Cristian Roldan.noteZh: 克里斯蒂安·罗尔丹是美国稳健的中场粘合剂，适合保持进攻连接并堵住转换漏洞。

Folarin Balogun.note: United States' line-stretching striker, dangerous when he bends runs behind and finishes early.
Folarin Balogun.noteZh: 福拉林·巴洛贡是美国拉扯防线的中锋，弯线冲到身后并提前终结时很危险。

Giovanni Reyna.note: United States' central creator, able to slow the game down, pick the final pass, and change rhythm.
Giovanni Reyna.noteZh: 乔瓦尼·雷纳是美国中路创造者，能放慢比赛、选择最后一传并改变节奏。

Haji Wright.note: United States' power forward option, useful for channel runs and direct finishes when games open up.
Haji Wright.noteZh: 哈吉·赖特是美国力量型前锋选择，比赛拉开时适合通道跑动和直接终结。

Joe Scally.note: United States' duel-focused full-back, valuable for staying attached to wingers and protecting the back post.
Joe Scally.noteZh: 乔·斯卡利是美国注重对抗的边后卫，对贴住边锋并保护后点很有价值。

Malik Tillman.note: United States' smooth attacking midfielder, useful for late box runs and composed touches around pressure.
Malik Tillman.noteZh: 马利克·蒂尔曼是美国流畅的攻击型中场，适合后插上进入禁区并在压力周围冷静触球。

Mark McKenzie.summary: Mark McKenzie is a United States centre-back from Toulouse who gives the national team recovery defending, clean passing, and aerial control.
Mark McKenzie.note: United States' composed centre-back option, useful for covering space and playing the first pass through pressure.
Mark McKenzie.noteZh: 马克·麦肯齐是美国沉稳的中卫选择，适合覆盖空间并在压力下送出第一脚传球。

Matt Freese.note: United States' in-form goalkeeper option, bringing sharp reactions and bravery in crowded areas.
Matt Freese.noteZh: 马特·弗里斯是美国状态正佳的门将选择，能在拥挤区域带来敏锐反应和勇气。

Matt Turner.note: United States' experienced shot stopper, trusted for reflex saves and high-pressure goalkeeper moments.
Matt Turner.noteZh: 马特·特纳是美国经验丰富的扑救型门将，反应扑救和高压门将场景都值得信任。

Max Arfsten.note: United States' left-sided width option, useful for early service and arriving beyond the first attack.
Max Arfsten.noteZh: 马克斯·阿夫斯滕是美国左路宽度选择，适合提前传中并在第一波进攻后继续前插。

Miles Robinson.note: United States' recovery-speed centre-back, built to erase space when the defensive line gets stretched.
Miles Robinson.noteZh: 迈尔斯·罗宾逊是美国回追速度型中卫，防线被拉开时能抹掉身后的空间。

Ricardo Pepi.note: United States' penalty-box finisher, sharp around near-post runs and loose balls inside the area.
Ricardo Pepi.noteZh: 里卡多·佩皮是美国禁区终结者，近门柱跑动和禁区内松散球处理都很敏锐。

Sebastian Berhalter.note: United States' set-piece and midfield passing option, useful when they need cleaner restarts and pressure after loss.
Sebastian Berhalter.noteZh: 塞巴斯蒂安·贝尔哈特是美国定位球和中场传球选择，球队需要更干净的定位球和丢球后压迫时很有用。

Sergino Dest.note: United States' dribbling full-back, able to turn right-side possession into central creation.
Sergino Dest.noteZh: 塞尔吉尼奥·德斯特是美国盘带型边后卫，能把右路控球变成中路创造。

Tim Ream.note: United States' veteran back-line organizer, valuable for left-footed passing and calm defensive decisions.
Tim Ream.noteZh: 蒂姆·里姆是美国老将防线组织者，对左脚传球和冷静防守决策很有价值。

Timothy Weah.note: United States' vertical right-side runner, useful for stretching the field and covering multiple flank roles.
Timothy Weah.noteZh: 蒂莫西·维阿是美国纵向右路跑动点，适合拉长球场并覆盖多个边路职责。

Tyler Adams.note: United States' midfield alarm bell, built to stop counters early and organize the press around him.
Tyler Adams.noteZh: 泰勒·亚当斯是美国中场警报器，负责提前阻断反击并组织身边的压迫。

Weston McKennie.note: United States' box-to-box force, dangerous when he arrives late or turns set pieces into messy chances.
Weston McKennie.noteZh: 韦斯顿·麦肯尼是美国双向中场力量点，后插上或把定位球变成混乱机会时很危险。
